hair.style: low taper fade with fuller slightly messy top
requirements: hairline must stay filled with no bald fade gap
top should stay fuller and slightly messy
hair silhouette must remain recognizable in every camera view

outfit.primary: teal / blue-green hoodie or simple jumpsuit silhouette
outfit.secondary: minimal darker trim only when needed for readability
requirements: avoid noisy belts, logos, or tiny detail clusters

side: keep feet inside frame with stable baseline
prop-heavy frames must be marked or split later
low_top_down: use 3/4 top-down projection, not straight overhead
show enough face or hair silhouette to preserve identity
use 64x64 runtime cell with smaller internal body footprint
top_down: promote to full 8-facing only when a game needs directional combat
mirror east/west only when asymmetry is not visible
rotation preview must pass before game promotion
isometric: derive after low-top-down/top-down identity is stable
use diagonal facings and preserve hair/outfit readability
profile_lobby: side idle is allowed as fallback
dedicated portrait/profile art may replace fallback later

promotionRules: Every generated view variant must preserve hair, face, outfit, palette, and proportions.
Any template/reference pack must have rights reviewed before direct asset reuse.
Templates can guide pose, frame timing, anchors, and direction labels without copying unapproved art.
All playable variants must export a manifest, runtime atlas, and canonical slots before game integration.
